name: ship-issue
description: Execute GitHub issues one at a time as vertical slices — sync, fetch, branch, TDD each acceptance criterion, functionally verify, self-review, open the PR, then babysit it to a terminal state before starting the next. Keeps `to-issues`-style slices from being re-horizontalized during execution: one issue, one branch, one PR, sequential. Bundles the full procedural playbook with completion-state and agent-delegation guidance.
